mapper.insert: insert into activity_favorite(user_id, activity_id, create_time) values(#{userId}, #{activityId}, #{createTime})
mapper.delete: delete from activity_favorite where user_id = #{userId} and activity_id = #{activityId}
mapper.select: select * from activity_favorite where user_id = #{userId} and activity_id = #{activityId}
select * from activity_favorite where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
select count(*) > 0 from activity_favorite where user_id = #{userId} and activity_id = #{activityId}
